name: Bob Porter
description: Blues and jazz record producer, discographer, writer, and radio presenter (1940–2021)
abstract: Robert Porter (June 20, 1940 – April 10, 2021) was an American record producer, discographer, writer, and radio presenter. He was responsible for reissuing many classic blues and jazz recordings, and in 2009 was inducted into the Blues Hall of Fame.

concerts.label: 50th Anniversary of Benny Goodman's 1938 Carnegie Hall Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Houston Person Part 2
about_quotes.evidence: I was talking to Bob Porter and I said, “this is so simple, to really bring jazz back into the mainstream of things.
about_quotes.doc_title: Houston Person Part 2 interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 2, 1998 [interview 2 of 2]
